titleStmt.title: SII 23.258: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 258. (A.R. No. 258 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Parāntaka I: year [30]: 936-37 A.D.

summary.p: This seems to record an endowment after purchase of 2 vēli of land called the vañjittōṭṭam, made by the assembly of Pāradāyakkuḍi in Naṟaiyūr-nāḍu, part of it being meant for providing for the expenses of a festival in the temple in honour of Varaguṇa-Viṭankar (Naṭarāja) in the month of Vaigāśi, and the balance for the maintenence of musicians who were to play on instruments during the early morning and other services in the temple. Refers to Kāri Nakkanār as the agent of the king in Koṅgu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matirai koṇṭa kopparakecariy yāṇṭu [3 10] koṅkil coḻaṉārkkāy śrīkāryam Ārāykiṉṟa
kāriy nakkaṉār meṉāyakattu Iṭṭa caṇṭaiykku tiru peru māṉaṭikaḷukku naṟaiyūrnāṭṭup piramateyam pāratā—
yakuṭiy sabhaiyārkku bhayār Iṟaiyyiliyāka viṟṟa nilam vañcit toṭṭamāṉa nilam
Iruveliyum viṟṟukkuṭutta ṉṟum caṇṭaiy nālum kaiymmaṇi Oṉṟum Ivvāṟu
kkum nilamāka ceykiṉṟatu caṇṭaiy nālu paliyum timilaiykku nilam pat kaymmaṇiykku kālum Āka nilam Oṉṟemukkālum varaku
ṇaviṭaṅkar vaiykāciyt tiruviḻāvukku kālvica kavum Ipparika yālam Iruveliyum Innilam Oṉṟeymukkālum koṇṭu muṉṟupotum koṭṭiy pa—
ḷḷiyeḻucciyum koṭṭuvomāṉom Ivvūr Uvaccarkaḷom .
Digital edition of SII 23.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
